author: y4rr
content: Plan: Add two new PTX kernels (gelu_tanh_kernel and gelu_erf_kernel), two new gpu_* functions, two new GpuBackend trait methods (gelu_tanh_f32, gelu_erf_f32), backend_impl overrides, and update gelu_with() forward dispatch in activation.rs to use them for CUDA tensors. Will also add gelu_tanh_backward PTX kernel for #465. Pattern follows existing gpu_gelu/gpu_gelu_backward.
